scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium close-up of the model sitting comfortably in a softly lit bathroom setting with natural light filtering in. The camera is on a tripod, maintaining a steady, gentle zoom-in to keep focus on her facial expressions and create intimacy. The depth of field is shallow, blurring out the background softly while keeping the model sharply in focus. The model faces and looks directly into the camera the entire time to maintain a sincere connection. Halfway through the scene, the model picks up the KYOGOKU Color Shampoo with her right hand, bringing the product close to her face for clear visibility, holding it naturally. There's a brief cut to a close-up of the shampoo bottle’s label before smoothly cutting back to the medium close-up on the model.
scene_1.dialogue: I wish I knew this before trying to cover my gray hair with messy dyes. I struggled for years until I found KYOGOKU Color Shampoo, which not only covers gray hair naturally while I shampoo but also nourishes my hair with natural ingredients like apple stem cells and hyaluronic acid. Now my hair feels healthier, shinier, and the floral scent makes every wash feel like a spa treatment.
